# Phase 1 Codex Prompt

Use this prompt for the next implementation task after the blueprint is approved.

## Prompt

Read `AGENTS.md` first.
Read `docs/build/phase-1-implementation-blueprint.md` first.

Scaffold the Chore Wars Next.js app foundation only.

Scope rules:

- Keep the scope narrow
- Use TypeScript
- Use Tailwind CSS
- Create a mobile-first route and layout skeleton
- Create no real business logic yet
- Preserve all existing docs
- Update logs after completion
- Run relevant validation commands
- Commit the changes
- Push a feature branch, not `main`

Branch name:

`codex/phase1-app-foundation`

Implementation boundaries:

- Scaffold the app shell and placeholder routes only
- Do not add real auth
- Do not add database migrations
- Do not add chore logic
- Do not add points logic
- Do not add reporting logic
- Do not add email, payment, Expo, or app-store work

Expected outcome:

- A minimal, mobile-first app scaffold that matches the blueprint
- A clean build baseline for the next phase of implementation
- A feature branch ready for review and follow-up tasks
